el":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6943505869392841736","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一个拥有神奇宠兽的世界！
有一脚踏碎城堡的魔山巨猿，有扶摇直上九万里的飞鹏，有一口烈焰焚烧千里的炽火鸟……
除了这些，还有可以和宠兽签订灵魂契约的御兽师，翱翔于蓝天白云之间，阅尽世间繁华。
但是，即便是最强大的神级御兽师，在佳兰城南文大街的宠兽店店主面前，却都要低下那高贵的头颅。
没有人知道店主从何而来，要去往何处。
他们只知道，那是天蓝星唯一一个超神驯养师！
一切，都从这家宠兽店开始！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/b2c33b9b4594411e4eb2a8720ce2b2b5","author":"混沌冬瓜精","author_id":"","book_id":"6943505869392841736","book_name":"超神驯养师","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2043人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6945690904451613197","read_count":"2043","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1006708"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"463","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,宠物","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/19b8482e3893ba88c1ab88aa0640bb52~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429176&x-signature=zxCv%2B9ouJ5Z7qqiUBs0HTd9F%2BY4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"365"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231352562DB70020905895B91F3C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读19小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7718,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":67077,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7672},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0
